notes:
## 1.7.5

## What's new

- **Block profile / user switch** — notification shade user switcher and Settings → Users bounce back to Steady.
- **Device Owner hard-lock** — no add/remove/switch user, logout tile disabled when Steady is Device Owner.
- Catches OEM wording (Guest, Secure Folder, Second Space, Dual Apps) without false-bouncing normal shade text.

## Update tip

Install on the **kid** phone. Pull down notifications and try the user/profile chip — Steady should bounce you. Settings → Users should also bounce.
